Q1.Q: How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?
Q1.A: 3, ['Request for description of traveler’s recent gear or equipment purchases for safety/insurance verification — not represented in template fields', 'Request for traveler’s owned physical gear details (e.g., harness, diving fins) to tailor activity equipment — not covered by any allowed information_requests field', 'Offer of optional airport transfer service — no field or value for transfers or local transportation add-ons']

Q2.Q: How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?
